name: rw-research-skill
description: 研究问题、文献、证据、设计、引用核验、主张核验、局部修订、写作和投稿工作流。

interface.shortDescription: Route and carry out research workflows.
interface.longDescription: RW Research Skill provides nineteen standalone workflows for research questions, literature discovery, paper extraction, evidence mapping, project state, research materials, statistical reporting, citation auditing, claim auditing, scoped revision, research design, review, academic writing, author tone, journal submission, and tool selection.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $rw-research-router to identify the current research bottleneck and route this request to one research skill.
